title: Rabids FARG Varients
description: Previously known as paleo palettes i am now working on this project solo, here is an updated resource pack that adds colour mutations to the mobs of fossil and archeology; Revival Genesis.
body:
Paleo palettes has unfortunately been discontinued so this is now a solo project, this is a launch of the solo venture plus an update including more mob varients.

!! Models and main textures made and belong to the the Fossils and Archeology; Revival Genesis team
!! additional textures belong to me.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Done mobs:
    Allosaurus
    Ankylosaurus
    Arthropleura
    Citipati
    Coelacanth
    Compsagnathus
    Confuciusornis
    Dicranurnus
    Dilophosaurus
    Dimorphodon
    Dryosaurus
    Elasmotherium
    Gallimimus
    Kelenken
    Megalania
    Megaloceros
    Megalograptus
    Meganaura
    Pachycephalosaurus
    Parasaurolophus
    Plesiosaurus
    Sarcosuchus
    Smilodon
    Therizinosaurus
    Tiktaalik
    Titanis
    Tyrannosaurus
    Velociraptor
    Walliserops


</details>

Nametag easteregg
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Naming a T-rex "Rexy" gives it an original JP skin 
![Rexy skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f09e689b6caae09299db795189ef9f9db0a0a480.png)

</details>
